acceptance_targets: [chapter_10_booker_001] PASS if, in the revised recruitment stretch anchored at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:95`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:121`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:139`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:157`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:175`, at least three beats create distinct new pressure and no more than one beat functions as a simple yes-and-tool confirmation before `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:273`; FAIL if the section still reads like repeated variations of the same ask/agree exchange.

[chapter_10_craft_001] PASS if the revised passage at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:389` and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:391` still makes Thea's stand socially costly while allowing a reader to interpret August's reaction as political or civic calculation only; FAIL if the wording still implies he is already starting to identify a more personal tie between Thea and Cora.

[chapter_10_prose_001] PASS if the revised cited passages at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:259`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:311`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:323`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:353`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:373`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:415` contain no more than one clipped negative-correction fragment total and still land the same narrative turns through full grammar or genuinely different rhythm; FAIL if the same fragment template still appears three or more times.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised recruitment stretch anchored at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:95`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:121`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:139`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:157`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:175`, at least three beats create distinct new pressure and no more than one beat functions as a simple yes-and-tool confirmation before `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:273`; FAIL if the section still reads like repeated variations of the same ask/agree exchange.
findings.evidence: `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:95`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:97`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:121`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:139`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:157`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:175` all run the same mini-engine: townsperson sketch, Hester's ask, conditional response, Hester's dry close.
findings.problem: The recruitment middle clarifies factions, but it repeats the same recruiting beat enough times that momentum plateaus before August arrives. The chapter starts tabulating support instead of escalating dread or social cost.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the recruitment run centered on `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:95`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:121`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:139`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:157`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:175` so at least two beats either combine or introduce a new lever such as refusal, rumor, a missing tool, or direct social cost before August enters at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:273`.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:389` and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:391` still makes Thea's stand socially costly while allowing a reader to interpret August's reaction as political or civic calculation only; FAIL if the wording still implies he is already starting to identify a more personal tie between Thea and Cora.
findings.evidence: `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:389` frames August's look as 'a recognition not yet formed into accusation,' and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:391` has Thea react as if she knows what he recognized.
findings.problem: This spends August's suspicion about what ties Cora and Thea together in chapter 10, but the continuity sheet places that suspicion in chapter 11. As written, the alley scene gets ahead of a canonical knowledge-state reveal.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:389` and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:391` so August clocks public insubordination and debtor-side alignment here, not emerging private-intimacy suspicion. Keep the gossip risk, but defer any hint that he has begun connecting Cora and Thea in the chapter-11-specific way.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised cited passages at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:259`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:311`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:323`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:353`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:373`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:415` contain no more than one clipped negative-correction fragment total and still land the same narrative turns through full grammar or genuinely different rhythm; FAIL if the same fragment template still appears three or more times.
findings.evidence: `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241` ('Not peace. Direction.'), `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:259` ('Not much. ... Enough.'), `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:311` ('Not sheriff first. Shame and credit.'), `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:323` ('Not thread. A small ugly bloom.'), `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:353` ('Not the sentence itself. The lack of permission.'), `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:373` ('Not a crowd. A faction.'), and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:415` ('Not the secret itself. Only the appetite for it.') repeat the same clipped correction shape.
findings.problem: The prose falls back on a constitution-banned fragment formula far more than twice in a single chapter. Instead of reading as pressure-sensitive compression, the repeated `Not X. Y.` construction starts sounding autopiloted and flattens the prose music.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the fragment clusters at `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:241`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:259`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:311`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:323`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:353`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:373`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:415` into complete syntax or clearly varied compression. Preserve the turn, but stop using `Not X. Y.` and related noun-fragment corrections as the chapter's default emphasis mechanism.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into queer secrecy, erotic specificity, dust-sick bodies, economic shame, bad bargains, and the humiliations of dependence. When deciding between a tidier scene and a truer one, choose the version that preserves historical pressure and emotional contradiction even if it leaves characters compromised, unsympathetic, or exposed.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If grief, desire, debt, illness, bodily damage, or shame are abstracted at the moment they should become sensory and social, rewrite toward the concrete consequence until the scene stops hiding from itself.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: moderate-high - contractions are the baseline for speech; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, social performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural rhythms across the book: survival set-piece, aftermath inventory, intimate chamber scene, bureaucratic squeeze, outdoor search, quiet communal ritual, preparation without payoff, public reckoning, and departure elegy. Vary scene counts, dialogue density, and where the turn comes from so consecutive chapters never feel built from the same dramatic machine.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken and period-credible, with agricultural, domestic, and biblical undertones used sparingly; favor exact nouns and verbs over decorative frontier lyricism.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person rotating among Cora, Thea, Dell, August, and Hester, with only brief collective widening when weather or communal memory demands it
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive prose: longer weather and labor sentences that can suddenly snap short at revelation, pain, or shame.
